seeds.label: Bedford Avenue closure
seeds.description: Compare the baseline bike route with a declared street closure.
seeds.missionText: Bike from Union Square to McCarren Park. Compare what changes if Bedford Avenue closes.

seeds.label: Village closure
seeds.description: Prepare a walking baseline for a street intervention.
seeds.missionText: Walk from Washington Square Park to Union Square and compare a street closure.

seeds.label: Crash weighting
seeds.description: Compare the same Brooklyn trip under historical-observation cost.
seeds.missionText: Bike from Cooper Park to McCarren Park and compare historical crash weighting.

seeds.label: East River change
seeds.description: Prepare a cross-neighborhood route for a declared change.
seeds.missionText: Ride from Tompkins Square Park to McCarren Park and compare a changed street.
